entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Cipher, you're clear of the perimeter. Stay sharp.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Fortress in sight. Target those firewall nodes.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Cipher... this corridor. This is where we lost Wraith's signal.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Massive construct ahead. That's the Gatekeeper.

entries.speaker: handler
entries.text: Cipher... you actually did it. First breach confirmed.
